task_description: Add statistics and leaderboard features to Intuition, Logical, and Trivia games. Implement Trivia multiplayer room mode. Fix Ngepet game issues: mystery box re-selection, auto-redirect to lobby on game end, reset greyed items on new match, candle animation after hiding, center all item images.

verification.summary: Android project - cannot build or test in sandbox. Code validated through semantic review (v1). All review issues addressed in follow-up commit. 2426 lines added across 17 files on branch feature/stats-leaderboard-games.
